name: 稳婆

appearance.face: 操劳粗糙，焦急时满头汗
appearance.hair: 已婚妇人发髻，用布巾束住
appearance.distinguishing_features: 产房中的专业与慌乱并存

visual_reference: Ancient Chinese midwife, practical older woman, sweat on forehead, dark plain robe, tense childbirth room atmosphere
visual_prompt_negative: modern medical scrubs, stethoscope, western hospital, tattoo
personality: 务实，急切，遵循宗法制度
desire: 保住产妇和孩子，尽快得到主家决断
flaw: 制度内行动，只能向丈夫请示保大保小
scene_presence: 难产场景核心功能人物
